criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-emergent-criteria-20260516-run2 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria qa-emergent-criteria-20260516-run2 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria qa-emergent-criteria-20260516-run2 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.
